smoke.detail: pixi run pytest endpoints/permeability/test_aggregate.py -q => 20 passed. Synthetic generalist + BOILED-Egg records produce a permeability flag and an absorption flag; %F (Bioavailability_Ma) is down-weighted out of the vote and flagged suspect; efflux (Pgp) surfaced apart; no single combined scalar; incompatible scales mapped-then-voted, never averaged.

note: permeability aggregator: two separate triage flags (permeability vote over Caco2/PAMPA + absorption vote over HIA_Hou/BOILED-Egg HIA); %F weak/down-weighted, efflux separate axis, no fabricated scalar.
